feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to release the service order showing an error message
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am assigning to repaired order to service order system showing an error message below.

I created a service notification and created a repaired order.

Reururn delivery created,

When creating the service order via the repaired order system, it shows an error message.System not to allow release the service order.

The item category N determined by the System is not a stock item category

Message No. IW822

Regards

HN

entry.title: How to Add Attachment to BP Store Business document
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, how to add an attachment(PDF) to BP(tcode) Store Business Document through the ABAP Program.

entry.title: SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, how to include payment document type DZ in exposure calculation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, can you please tell how to include payment document type DZ (customer payment or any other document type) in exposure calculation (It's a specific business requirement). I did not find any configuration step allowing this.

It may seems strange to include customer payment in exposure but it's a reel business requirement related to factoring ( you'are paied by bank and then bank will be paied by the reel customer)

Regards

entry.title: Print Specific Pages After Mail Merge in Custom Program for DMS Word Document in CA01
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am working on a custom program where I need to print a DMS document attached in transaction CA01. We are currently performing a mail merge and printing the document using a custom-developed program, and this functionality is working as expected.

However, the requirement has changed. Now, I need to print only specific pages of the document, based on the input parameters provided, after performing the mail merge.

Could someone please guide me on how to achieve the following:

  • Perform the mail merge as usual.
  • Print only the pages specified by the input parameters instead of printing the entire document.

Mail Merge :

i_oi_document_prox->has_mail_merge_interface 

i_oi_document_prox->get_mail_merge_interface

Print :

i_oi_mail_merg->print

I would appreciate any insights, code snippets, or suggestions on how to implement this functionality.

Thanks in advance!

SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP

entry.title: How to generate an XAF audit file Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello,

we got the request from our dutch accountant to generate an XAF File for Auditors. Although XAF seems to be obligatory since 2010 we were not aksed until now to provide such information. When I check  the Support Portal I found a lot of notes how to establish this function by using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance but these are all valid only for S/4 HANA.

So although we have licensed SAP DRC due to other request we do not have S/4 HANA at the moment, we are still running on ECC 6.18.

There are also some very rough descriptions how to enable ECC by using DART and AIF to generate this file but these explanation are not detailed enough and AIF Setup is not really smart.

I would be pleased if somebody with an SAP ERP 6.18 share his/her customer expierence with me how to deal with this challenge.

Regards

Holger

SAP ERP SAP Document and Reporting Compliance FIN (Finance) SAP Application Interface Framework

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud Workflow field update use string in the formula
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I want to concatenate two strings with a workflow in SAP Service Cloud (V1), workflow type field update.
Is it possible to have a blank space between it? 
I tried with " or ' but it is not working, it is showing a syntax error... 

Does somebody have a tip?

Thanks a lot!

Deborah

entry.title: How to change FIORI App Deploy Task Language in BAS
entry.content: I am getting deploy task (with command - npm run deploy) output in language other than English, kindly guide me to change it to English Language

entry.title: How to name elements in custom root entity in RAP dynamically.
entry.content:
I am using a custom root entity in SAP RAP and want to name the elements dynamically during runtime. 
how to achieve that ?

entry.title: C4C - Routing ticket to new agent after esclation
entry.content:
Hi All,

Does in C4C Auto routing is possible?

Business Case: 

If ticket is not completed in given SLA, it should auto escalate to agent's TL or any other person automatically.. is this possible. If so can any one help me

entry.title: SAP SLT Replicate only New Records ?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Can you please let me know if we can Replicate only new records into Target HANADB from SAP ECC using SLT?

I want to load only new records and exclude or filter out delta records for the same key.

Can we configure SAP SLT like this ? For example adding New generic field as  timestamp field as KEY in LTRS ? i tried this but cannot mark the field as KEY.

entry.title: Failed to create HDI container on database because of: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1891]
entry.content:
I am trying to deploy a CAP project and upon deploying I encountered an error regarding the hdi creation.

I can' find an article about this, is there anyone who is familiar with the missing privilege?

 

Thank you!

#SAPHana #SAPHANACloud

entry.title: Tax Value not calculated in Purchase Order from Condition Record FV11
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, Our Requirement is to maintain Tax Values for same HSN Code for a different Region, So, We have Maintained Condition Record with T-Code FV11 for Three Conditions JICG,JISG & JIIG but Tax Percentage from Condition Record is not Picked according to the Combination. In FV11 we are taking Destination Country, Region, Region of Delivery Plant, GST Vendor Classification, Tax ind. f. material and Control Code. Kindly check attached Process Document and suggest solution.                                                   We created a condition record for different Region with the same HSN Code and Tax Code

JICG & JISG

We are taking First Key Combination for create a Condition Record.

entry.title: SAP GTS
entry.content:
HI ALL,

There 2 legal regulations for those having same material/products. and same general settings configurations. even 1 legal regulation triggered and 1 legal regulation is not. why?

entry.title: Which way of S4 Hana system implementation is suggested, if client is new to SAP and or old to SAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Ref. to subject mentioned. can you through some light on it.!

Because, yesterday I have attended an interview for SAP Head position in Hyd in a product based company especially a Manufacturing industry, they were saying they are using sap from past 20 years (this is a bid wonder?), but the company is 30 years old. and recently 2 years ago they have to SAP S4 Hana system.

However still they are not happy, says that they have lot of gaps in their system after implementing SAP S4Hana, not sure, if they have implemented green field implementation (meaning from the scratch, need to build the organization into new S4 Hana ERP system, Fiori based).

And also said that, they have these concerns mentioning below: 

-1). People issue (might be their company people /business have not cooperated and or supported during migration)

-2). Data inputs have not given properly,

-3). Systems issues

feeling, all these because the work is not done properly in the first 3 phases of Activate methodology. Discover, Prepare and Explore phases were not fully utilized, meaning the activities and or task were not well taken care, is it not?

Otherwise, they have now still gaps, and the management were not happy, cause they reports or dash board are not meeting as per their expectation, due to that, management is not able to take proper decision and or they is a delay in that or lagging... resulting in that, they are not satisfied it seems. And they said that, it as implemented by a Pune based sap implementation partner.!

but one thing asked since they are old to sap 20 years, still their system is not fully stabilized.. so is it not because of something else, that is just influence of owners? because its a private limited company. One man army show, so feeling sap have developed a methodology to utilize and implement the new system for their industry for better way of digitization of their enterprise right?  And the results are as expected, provided when the companies follow better, and leverage all the best practices and implemented, right?

So, need your expert opinion, what might be the causes, best possible suggestions.!

Appreciate your expertise thoughts.!

Thanks in advance,

Regards.

Er.K.S.

entry.title: How to set up Catalog Approval flow base on Commodity code in SAP Ariba?
entry.content: Hello Experts, In SAP Ariba, I am trying to set up Catalog Workflow based on the Commodity code. I used the field 'Supplier.Subscription.Categories.UniqueName'. However, Ariba does not seem to recognize the condition and adds Customer Admin. The catalog is locally loaded by the Buyer. Can we use 'Subscription.Supplier.Categories.Uniquename' for locally managed catalogs or is it used only for catalogs managed by the suppliers?

entry.title: SapJCo3: SNC between Java application with multiple SAP ABAP application servers
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently able to setup a functioning SNC between a Java application (through SAPJCo library) and a SAP/HANA system using these 2 scenarios according to the procedures described on this  SAP Note. On the server where the Java application runs, the PSE and cred_v2 files are located in same folder whose path is the value of the SECUDIR environment variable. However, this architecture does not seem workable when if another SAP system is to be SNC connected to same Java application. As far as I have tested, the cred_v2 file supports storing credentials for talking to only a single SAP system. How then can one SNC connect a single Java application to multiple SAP ABAP systems ?

I have searched online and have not found useful threads. One SAP Community thread mentions a link that offers no useful information.

entry.title: Full and partial pallet putaway storage type determination based on quantity classification
sap fiori road map on on-premise and cloud platform
entry.content: HI any One can Explain the sap fiori road map on on-premise and what are the steps we can take when we configure on-premise to cloud platform.

entry.title: Movement using the MIGO T-code, it works correctly. BUT SAME BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE ERROR
entry.content: When I perform a 101 movement using the MIGO T-code, it works correctly. However, when I attempt the same movement using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, I receive the following errors: 'Shortfall of 41 days against SLED in current item (20.08.2024)' and 'Shortfall of 115 days against remaining shelf life in current item (365 days). I used the same material and batch for the Purchase Order in both MIGO and the BAPI. Could anyone please provide a solution or guidance on where to check for this issue in the BAPI?

entry.title: Fixed Asset acquisition in IFRS only in new asset accounting
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have Business requirement for Fixed Asset acquisition in Leading ledger only.

It is possible in New asset accounting, I remember in ECC its possible.(Create New Transaction type(OA73) and OAYA. But New asset accounting its restrict Limit Transaction Types to Depreciation Areas.

Could you pleae provide the any other way.
